channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: McDonald's: $5 McValue Meal Deal
item.description: Choose a McDouble or McChicken plus 4pc Nuggets, small fries & small Coca-Cola for $5 at participating locations via app or in-store. (Limited time)

item.title: McDonald's: BOGO Big Mac or 10pc Nuggets – Sweet Treat Week
item.guid: McDonald's-BOGO Big Mac or 10pc Nuggets – Sweet Tre-2026-07-16
item.description: Get a free Big Mac or 10-piece Chicken McNuggets with a qualifying order this week (July 16–22) via the McDonald's app. (Through July 22, 2026)

item.title: Wendy's: Free Frosty with $20+ Order
item.description: Order $20 or more this week and get a free Frosty added to your order — Sweet Treat Week deal active July 16–22. (Through July 22, 2026)

item.title: Wendy's: Biggie Deals from $4
item.description: Grab a complete Biggie Deal meal — Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken BLT with sides and drink — starting at $4 via the app. (Limited time)

item.title: Taco Bell: Cravings Value Menu – Items $3 or Less
item.guid: Taco Bell-Cravings Value Menu – Items $3 or Less-2026-07-16
item.description: Pick from 10 fan-favorite menu items priced at $3 or less any day via the app or in-store, including burritos, tacos, and potato items. (Ongoing)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza Any Crust for $9.99
item.description: Order any pizza with any crust and any toppings for $9.99 each — Parmesan Stuffed Crust now included at no extra charge. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Domino's: $7.99 Carryout Special
item.description: Get any 1-topping carryout pizza (excl. XL), 8-piece wings, or boneless chicken for $7.99 when you order online for carryout. (Ongoing)

item.title: Panera Bread: BOGO Entree for $5 — Code BOGO5
item.guid: Panera Bread-BOGO Entree for $5 — Code BOGO5-2026-07-16
item.description: Buy one whole sandwich, salad, Market Bowl, Salad Stuffer, bowl of soup, or mac and get a second for just $5 using promo code BOGO5 at checkout. (Limited time)

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix & Match $4.99 Menu
item.description: Save ~40% off regular prices by ordering half-portion soups, sandwiches, and salads from the Mix & Match $4.99 menu — up to 10 items per order. (Ongoing)

item.title: Starbucks: $10 Off $25+ Order – Sweet Treat Week
item.guid: Starbucks-$10 Off $25+ Order – Sweet Treat Week-2026-07-16
item.description: Get $10 off any Starbucks order of $25 or more this week (July 16–22) — great for stocking up on drinks or treating a group. (Through July 22, 2026)

item.title: Tropical Smoothie Cafe: Free Smoothie with $20+ Order
item.guid: Tropical Smoothie Cafe-Free Smoothie with $20+ Order-2026-07-16
item.description: Get a free smoothie added to your order of $20 or more this week (July 16–22) — Sweet Treat Week deal available online and in the app. (Through July 22, 2026)

item.title: KFC: 24-Piece Nugget Bucket for $10
item.description: Score a 24-piece Nugget Bucket for just $10 at KFC — one of the chain's best-value buckets available now. (Limited time)

item.title: KFC: Taste of KFC 2-Piece Meal for $6
item.description: Get a 2-piece Signature Chicken meal for $6 at participating KFC locations — a solid everyday value. (Ongoing)

item.title: Arby's: $1.99 Sliders
item.description: Get any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time. (Limited time)

item.title: Dairy Queen: Free Dilly Bar with $1+ App Purchase
item.guid: Dairy Queen-Free Dilly Bar with $1+ App Purchase-2026-07-16
item.description: DQ app users get one free Dilly Bar with any in-app purchase of $1 or more — valid July 13–19 in the DQ app only. (Through July 19, 2026)

item.title: Dairy Queen: $7 Meal Deal
item.description: Get 3 Crispy Chicken Strips or an Original Cheeseburger, regular fries, a 21-oz drink, dipping sauce, and a sundae for $7 in-store, online, or in-app. (Limited time)

item.title: Little Caesars: $5 Large Pizzas – App Exclusive
item.guid: Little Caesars-$5 Large Pizzas – App Exclusive-2026-07-16
item.description: Get a large pizza exclusively through the Little Caesars app for just $5 at participating locations. (Limited time)

item.title: Shake Shack: Classic Hot Dog Meal for $8 – Code SUMMERDOG
item.guid: Shake Shack-Classic Hot Dog Meal for $8 – Code SUMME-2026-07-16
item.description: Get a classic hot dog paired with classic fries or classic lemonade for $8 using code SUMMERDOG in-app, online, or at a kiosk through July 19. (Through July 19, 2026)

item.title: Denny's: America 250 Limited-Time Menu
item.description: Denny's has a special America 250 menu featuring a Red, White & Berry Float and a delivery-only Spicy All-American Burrito through August 18. (Through August 18, 2026)

item.title: Insomnia Cookies: Free Delivery on $15+ – Code SWEETSUMMER
item.guid: Insomnia Cookies-Free Delivery on $15+ – Code SWEETSUMMER-2026-07-16
item.description: Get free delivery on any Insomnia Cookies order of $15 or more when you enter promo code SWEETSUMMER at online checkout. (Limited time)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal
item.description: Wingstop's fan-favorite Boneless Meal Deal is back at $16.99 for soccer season — great value for wings fans ordering online or in the app. (Limited time)

item.title: El Pollo Loco: New Frescas Salads & Wraps
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-New Frescas Salads & Wraps-2026-07-16
item.description: El Pollo Loco's new Citrus Avocado and Mexican Cobb Fresca Salads and Wraps are available for a limited time — flame-grilled chicken, drive-thru friendly. (Limited time)
